modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to view print balance and transaction history.

full_description_text:  
I was trying to check my print balance and see my transaction history, but I couldn't find the information anywhere. It seems like the option to view these details is missing or not functioning properly. I really need to keep track of my printing usage, especially with all the projects I have going on. It would be great to have access to this information easily!
